project_type: TypeScript pnpm monorepo with Turborepo - 9 apps + 30+ shared packages
build_system: pnpm 10.28.1 + Turborepo 2.x. Workspace packages in apps/* and packages/*. Root scripts: pnpm lint, pnpm test, pnpm build, pnpm typecheck
test_framework: Vitest 2.x with globals: true, coverage via @vitest/coverage-v8. Tests in __tests__/ directories. Mock pattern: vi.fn() mocks for Prisma client.
build_command: pnpm typecheck (no build outputs - packages use src/index.ts directly via main/types fields)
test_command: pnpm test (runs turbo test which runs vitest in each package)
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm install to install new deps. 2. Run pnpm typecheck for TypeScript compilation. 3. Run pnpm test to run all Vitest tests.
setup_instructions: 1. pnpm install (workspace root). 2. Prisma generate may fail without DB but @prisma/client types work from schema.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network - can install packages from npm. No Docker daemon available for docker-compose. No database available - tests must mock Prisma. Node 22+.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits. ESLint + Prettier formatting. TypeScript strict mode.
key_patterns: 1. Workspace packages export via src/index.ts (no build step needed). 2. Auth package uses class-based services (TokenService, SessionService). 3. Database package has repository pattern with BaseRepository. 4. Prisma schema has Session and RefreshToken models already. 5. Root vitest.config.ts with globals:true. 6. Package-level vitest.config.ts in @quant/database. 7. tsconfig.json uses path aliases (@quant/auth, @quant/database etc).
directory_structure: Root: apps/ (9 apps), packages/ (30+ packages). Key packages: auth (token/session/oauth), server (router/middleware), database (prisma/repositories), common (types/utils). QuantMail is the central identity service with api/ directory containing routes, controllers, services, middleware.
